---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or API endpoint
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Module

Which module? (e.g. `arr/sonarr`, or "new module" for a new service)

## Description

What feature or API endpoint would you like added?

## Use Case

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

## API Reference

Link to the upstream API documentation for the endpoint(s), if applicable.

## Additional Context

Any other context or examples.
